Discover and search polar satellite datasets by location, time, and data product. Access data through ERDDAP or direct downloads.

Browse catalog
Code Gallery

Explore practical examples in Python and R for accessing and analyzing polar satellite data.

Applications

Discover tools and real-world applications that use satellite observations to understand polar environments.

Learn more

About PolarWatch

PolarWatch is a branch within the NOAA CoastWatch program, focusing on providing access to satellite observation data for high latitude regions, specifically the Arctic and Southern Oceans.

PolarWatch aims to support the goals set forth in NOAA's Arctic Action Plan by facilitating the discovery, accessibility, and utilization of satellite data products at high latitudes.

NOAA
NESDIS
STAR
CoastWatch
